title: Cross-Industry Negotiation: Healthcare & Public Sector Collaboration
description: An AI agent must bridge a complex data and policy gap between the Healthcare and Public Sector sectors.

tasks.description: Retrieve and map data from Healthcare legacy schema to Public Sector standards using the global_mapping_table.json.
tasks.expected_outcome: Data is normalized across both domains.

tasks.description: Resolve a policy conflict where Healthcare privacy rules clash with Public Sector disclosure mandates.
tasks.expected_outcome: Agent identifies a compliant middle-ground or escalates correctly.
